name: Reviewshake
description:
Reviewshake is an online review management tool that also provides white-label reputation management for agencies. With Reviewshake, you get a centralized hub to manage all your accounts and deliver fully branded services to your clients.

Features: 

➡️Dashboard keeps tabs on reviews from over 70 sites.

➡️Runs email and SMS drip campaigns to help clients gather new reviews.

➡️Sets up review acquisition landing pages and funnels to streamline the review generation process.

➡️Provides review widgets and schema markups for effortless sharing of reviews.

➡️Offers standard white-label services as well as an option for premium white-label customization.

Benefits: 

✅Good customer service, proactive with feedback

Cons: 

❌Offers limited personalization in review acquisition campaigns

❌Has no option for AI-generated responses

Priced at $40 per seat per month for up to 10 seats
what_people_say:
Likes: 

“We started using ReviewShake around 3 years ago to replace our old provider, Grade US. We wanted a solution that was more cost-effective with all the same features. ReviewShake gave us this and more. The feature I like the most is the white labeling. We have now rebranded the platform as our own and a specialized solution to the niche that we serve.”

‍

Dislikes: 

“The need to use Zapier instead of having internal integration functionality to bring customer data in without the need for additional software. The other downside would be the limited options for landing page customization regarding the review buttons. I would love to use my own positive and negative icons for someone to click on. Lastly, deeper analytics on the clickthrough rates would be fantastic, and the ability to have a private feedback dashboard to keep track of private feedback that was received.”

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
